author: Bryan Tinsley
text: Bug detail: top bar health indicator DID go red when server went down. But the chat area still showed connected and accepted input. User typed a long message into a dead connection and lost it. The chat WebSocket/connection state and the top bar health check are independent — they need to be unified. Chat input MUST be disabled when server is unreachable. Also: draft text must be preserved in localStorage so it survives disconnection.
